# Suggested First 20 GitHub Issues

These issues currently target the active `alibaba-cloud-engineering-blueprint/` folder unless the issue says it is repository-wide.

1. Add PNG exports for the top 5 Mermaid diagrams.
2. Expand the ECS lab with screenshots.
3. Add Terraform for secure VPC baseline.
4. Add OSS static website Terraform example.
5. Add RAM least-privilege policy examples.
6. Add RDS connection troubleshooting guide.
7. Add ACK deployment manifest sample.
8. Add Function Compute sample handler.
9. Add CloudMonitor dashboard example.
10. Add SLS query examples for web access logs.
11. Expand MaxCompute notes with partitioning examples.
12. Add DataWorks workflow screenshots.
13. Add real-time streaming sample schema.
14. Add cost estimate examples for beginner labs.
15. Add official docs links to every service page.
16. Add architecture review checklist examples.
17. Add senior interview rubric.
18. Add certification flashcards.
19. Add GitHub Actions Markdown link check.
20. Add contributor guide for Mermaid diagrams.
